title: Lafarge Africa Improves 2025 First Quarter Earnings, Surprise Investors With N4 Interim Dividend - FinancialEDGE
description: Lafarge Africa Plc, on thursday released its unaunaudited first quarter result for the period ended march 31, 2025, reporting a remarkable 836.7% surge in earnings per share to N3.02 as against N0.32 that was recorded in 2024. Just as the board of directors has proposed an interim dividend of N4.00 per share, translating to
html: Lafarge Africa Plc,  on thursday released its unaunaudited first quarter result for the period ended march 31, 2025, reporting a remarkable 836.7% surge in earnings per share to N3.02 as against N0.32 that was recorded in 2024.
